title: Pickaxe of the Gods (Mod)
description: An unbreakable pickaxe with 20 levels (POG), which improves level by level !
body:
[Plugin version of this mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/pickaxe-of-the-gods)

An unbreakable pickaxe that gains XP for each block it breaks.
Each level requires 100 XP more than the previous one.
The pickaxe becomes more powerful when it levels up.


![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ba1542bb97af2eeeca95ed808ee54cff97789c.png)


![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/055f763a074b874ead1807f9e72841d95b8a8432.png)
